# CWE-89 vulnerable: string-concat Query still fires (prepare same-var suite pair)
lang: go
file: CWE-89-prepare-same-var-vulnerable.go
variant: taint-prepare
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// LookupUser builds SQL via string concatenation — must still fire CWE-89.
func LookupUser(db *sql.DB, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	query := "SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE name = '" + name + "'"
	rows, err := db.Query(query)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	_ = rows
}
